original: Rattled and damaged, even smoking somewhere, the machina wobbles closer to the earth. You relax a bit, thinking that this might be the robot’s final ‘death throes’. You are not sure what sort it is, too dirty and masked by plants, but you don’t have a lot of time to figure out. The thick firearm explodes out in short order, sending a massive pellet your way!
